aiSummary:
# Universal Tuya Zigbee GitHub Activity Summary

## New Device Requests
1. **Fingerbot Plus**
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZ3210_j4pdtz9v` / **Model:** `TS0001`
   - **User:** AntondK88
   - **Issue Link:** [Request #869](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/869)
   - **Status:** Open

2. **PIR Motion Brightness Sensor**
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZE284_bquwrqh1` / **Model:** `TS0601`
   - **User:** cristianoisaac
   - **Issue Link:** [Request #1351](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1351)
   - **Status:** Open

## Existing Fingerprints Supported
- **Fingerbot**
  - **Fingerprint:** `_TZ3210_j4pdtz9v`
  - **Drivers:** `curtain_motor`, `fingerbot`
  
- **Presence Sensor Radar**
  - **Fingerprints:** 
    - `_TZ321C_fkzihaxe8`
    - `_TZ321C_fkzihax8`
  - **Driver:** `presence_sensor_radar`

## Fingerprints from Forks to Integrate
- No new fingerprints from forks were identified in the current analysis.

## Pull Requests with Useful Changes
1. **Update driver.compose.json**
   - **PR #10** by Peter-Celica
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZ3000_mrpevh8p`
   - **Status:** Closed, not merged
   - [View PR](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/10)

2. **Update driver.compose.json**
   - **PR #45** by vl14-dev
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZE200_nv6nxo0c`
   - **Status:** Closed, merged
   - [View PR](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/45)

3. **Support for MOES/Tuya Zigbee AM25 Tubular Motor**
   - **PR #46** by vl14-dev
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZE200_nv6nxo0c` / **Model:** `TS0601`
   - **Status:** Closed, not merged
   - [View PR](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/46)

4. **Add support for Tuya PIR sensor TS0202**
   - **PR #1166** by chernals
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZ3000_c8ozah8n`
   - **Status:** Closed, not merged
   - [View PR](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1166)

5. **Added TS110E driver**
   - **PR #1350** by PiTRiS87
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZ3210_ngqk6jia`, `_TZ3210_weaqkhab`
   - **Status:** Open
   - [View PR](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1350)

6. **Added 3 new devices**
   - **PR #1253** by Peter-Celica
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZE200_pay2byax`, `_TZ3000_mrpevh8p`
   - **Status:** Open
   - [View PR](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1253)

7. **Update driver.compose.json**
   - **PR #1219** by Melectro1
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZ3000_gjrubzje`
   - **Status:** Open
   - [View PR](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1219)

8. **Update driver.compose.json**
   - **PR #1218** by Melectro1
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZE204_dapwryy7`
   - **Status:** Open
   - [View PR](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1218)

9. **Add fingerprint `_TZE204_bjzrowv2`**
   - **PR #1195** by YuriEstevan
   - **Status:** Open
   - [View PR](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1195)

This summary encapsulates the latest developments and requests in the Universal Tuya Zigbee repository, facilitating community engagement and contributions.
